name: Alpha Meta Strategy
author: Combined — VDP + RSI+VWAP + BB+RSI + CVD + FVG

architecture.layer_1_macro: Weekly EMA 21/50/200 bias (VDP + Tone Vase) — sets bull/bear direction
architecture.layer_2_regime: ADX routing — ranging (<20) uses mean reversion, trending (>25) uses pullback entries
architecture.layer_3_entry: Combined BB + RSI + VWAP — three independent signals scored and summed

scoring.entry_signal: +2 points (mean reversion, VWAP fade, or trend pullback)
scoring.note: Higher score = higher conviction. 4+ = valid signal. 6+ = high conviction.

risk_rules: Session filter: London + NY hours only

when_to_use.all_conditions: Macro bias + regime + entry + precision all align = highest conviction
